name: DUCT ECTASIA
definition: nonspecific dilatation of one / more ducts > 2 mm / of ampullary duct segment > 3 mm
dominant_finding: anechoic smooth-walled branching structures tapering toward the periphery
discriminating_features: retroareolar serpentine radiodense structures converging on the nipple-areolar complex
anechoic smooth-walled branching structures tapering toward the periphery
filled with fluid / thick inspissated secretions or cellular debris ± movement of
± coarse smooth-bordered rod-/ cigar-shaped calcifications pointing toward the nipple

general: retroareolar serpentine radiodense structures converging on the nipple-areolar complex

± coarse smooth-bordered rod-/ cigar-shaped calcifications pointing toward the nipple
